name: Κλιντ Ίστγουντ
desc: Κλιντ Ίστγουντ is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Super League Greece club PAOK FC. He was born on February 16, 1997, in Thessaloniki, Greece.

name: Χιου Γκραντ
desc: Χιου Γκραντ is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Super League Greece club PAOK and the Greece national team. He was born on September 16, 1998, in Thessaloniki, Greece.

name: Βραβεία Γκράμι του 2002
desc: The Grammy Awards of 2002 were a ceremony held on February 28, 2002, to recognize excellence in music for the year 2001. The event was won by American singer-songwriter Norah Jones, who took home five awards, including Album of the Year and Record of the Year.

name: Ουίλιαμ Χένρι Χάρισον
desc: Owens William Henry Harison was a British Army officer who served as the Governor of Barbados from 1836 to 1841. He is also notable for being the son-in-law of Sir George Prevost, the last Governor-General of British North America.

name: Τζακ Νίκολσον
desc: Jack Nicholson is an American actor, director, and producer who has appeared in over 80 films throughout his career. Born on April 28, 1938, he is known for iconic roles in films such as "Easy Rider," "Chinatown," and "One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest."

name: Ίρβιν Γουίνκλερ
desc: Íρβιν Γουίνκλερ was a Greek footballer who played as a midfielder for clubs such as AEK Athens and Olympiacos. He is best known for his appearances in the 1960s and 1970s, representing Greece at international level.

name: J-pop
desc: The term J-pop refers to a form of popular music that entered the musical mainstream of Japan in the 1990s. In Japan it is known simply as pops . Modern J-pop has its roots in traditional music of Japan, and global 1960s pop and rock music. J-pop replaced kayōkyoku, a term for Japanese popular music from the 1920s to the 1980s in the Japanese music scene.

name: Τζακ Μπρους
desc: Jackie Bruce is an American former professional wrestler, best known for his time in the World Wrestling Federation (WWF), now WWE. He was a two-time WWF Tag Team Champion with various partners during his career.

name: Κριστίν Σκοτ Τόμας
desc: Κριστίν Σκοτ Τόμαส is a Greek singer, songwriter, and record producer. She has released several albums and singles in Greece and internationally, but no notable collaborations or awards are documented.

name: Καλβινισμός
desc: Calvinism is a Christian theological system developed by John Calvin, emphasizing predestination, the sovereignty of God, and the authority of Scripture. It emerged in the 16th century as a response to Catholicism and Protestantism, influencing Reformed Christianity and shaping Western theology.

name: Ελεάνορ Ρούζβελτ
desc: Eleonor Rousvelt is a Greek actress who has appeared in various films and television shows, primarily in Greek cinema. No additional information about her life, career, or notable works is currently available in the knowledge graph.

name: Χάποελ Μπερ Σεβά
desc: Χάποελ Μπερ Σεβά is a Greek footballer who plays as a midfielder for Super League Greece club Panathinaikos F.C. He was born on March 11, 1994, in Athens, Greece.

name: Χρυσό (χρώμα)
desc: Χρυσό (χρώμα) is a vibrant yellow color with a wavelength range of approximately 570-590 nanometers, often associated with the metal gold. In Greek culture and language, χρυσό refers to gold in its various forms, including its use in jewelry, coins, and other decorative items.

name: ΡΚΣ Βάαλβαϊκ
desc: ΡΚΣ Βάαλβαϊκ is a Greek professional football club based in Valaoria, Cyprus. The club was founded in 1978 by Cypriot Greeks from the Valaoria region of Cyprus.

name: Βραβεία Γκράμι του 2007
desc: The 2007 Grammy Awards were held on February 10, 2007, at the Staples Center in Los Angeles, California. The ceremony honored musical releases from 2006, with U2 winning the most awards, including Album of the Year for "How to Dismantle an Atomic Bomb".

name: Φυσική ιστορία
desc: The Physical History (Φυσική ιστορία) is a term used to describe the study of the natural world, including the Earth's physical processes, geological events, and the history of the planet. This field of study encompasses various disciplines such as geology, paleontology, and astronomy, aiming to understand the evolution and dynamics of the Earth and its components over time.

name: Υποθυρεοειδισμός
desc: Underthyroidism is a rare endocrine disorder characterized by an underproduction of thyroid hormones, leading to symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. It can be caused by various factors, including genetic mutations, autoimmune disorders, and certain medications, and may require lifelong thyroid hormone replacement therapy.

name: Σαν Σαλβαδόρ
desc: Σαν Σαλβαδór (San Salvador) is a municipality in the province of San Miguel, El Salvador. It is located approximately 20 kilometers north of San Salvador City, the capital of El Salvador.

name: Ταϊπέι
desc: Taï péi is a traditional Cypriot dessert consisting of small, sweet pastries filled with a mixture of ground nuts and spices. It is typically served as a snack or dessert during special occasions and celebrations in Cyprus.

name: Χάιντουκ Σπλιτ
desc: Χάιν두κ Σπλιτ is a historic fortress located on the island of Crete, Greece, built by the Venetians in the 14th century. The fortress was constructed to protect the port city of Chania from pirate attacks and has since been restored as a museum showcasing the island's history and culture.

name: Φράιμπουργκ
desc: Φράιμπουργκ is a town in Greece, specifically in the regional unit of Kozani, located in the region of Macedonia. It has a population of approximately 3,000 people and is known for its historic significance and natural surroundings.

name: Χουλκ (ποδοσφαιριστής)
desc: Χουλκ is a Greek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Super League Greece club PAOK FC. No additional information about his career, personal life, or achievements is currently available in the knowledge graph.

name: Aaliyah
desc: Aaliyah is an American singer, actress, and model who was born on January 16, 1979, in Brooklyn, New York. She rose to fame with her debut album "Age Ain't Nothing but a Number" in 1994, which included the hit singles "Back & Forth" and "If Your Girl Only Knew".

name: Ντέιβιντ Πετρέους
desc: David Petreus is a Greek businessman, investor, and former chairman of the Hellenic Petroleum Company. He served as the Chairman of the Board of Directors of Hellenic Petroleum from 2011 to 2020.

name: Πιερ Πάολο Παζολίνι
desc: Πιερ Πάολο Παζολίνι was an Italian-born Greek footballer who played as a midfielder for several clubs, including Olympiacos FC and AEK Athens FC. He won multiple domestic titles with his teams, but no international honors.
